# VeriWorkly Portfolio

> Build and publish a professional developer or designer portfolio website in minutes on your own VeriWorkly subdomain.

## Core Features
- **One Reusable Content Model**: Fill your profile once, switch visual templates freely without losing content.
- **Signal Template**: A precise, proof-first portfolio optimized for product engineers and technical builders.
- **Atelier Template**: An editorial, case-study first layout for designers, creative builders, and visual storytellers.
- **Private Draft Workflow**: Edit and preview your drafts before publishing.
- **SEO & Social Metadata**: Customize page titles, meta descriptions, and sharing parameters for search engine optimization and generative engine optimization.
- **Analytics**: Built-in page view and referrer analytics.

## Links
- [Landing page](https://portfolio.veriworkly.com)
- [Pricing details](https://portfolio.veriworkly.com/pricing)
- [Templates catalog](https://portfolio.veriworkly.com/templates)
- [Workspace Dashboard](https://portfolio.veriworkly.com/dashboard)
